zh.lifeSummary: 當John Reade於1340年出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾肯登時，他的父親Thomas Reade40歲，母親Margery Reide21歲。他於1364年與Alice DeRougham在英國英格蘭諾福爾可盧加姆結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1404年5月20日在他的家鄉享年64歲，埋葬在英國波克夏。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Reade于1340年出生在英国英格兰奧可福爾肯登时，他的父亲Thomas Reade40岁，母亲Margery Reide21岁。他于1364年与Alice DeRougham在英国英格兰諾福爾可盧加姆结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1404年5月20日在他的家乡享年64岁，埋葬在英国波克夏。

nameMeanings.name: Reade
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Read
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Reed  .

History: A family called Read were established in America in the early 18th century by John Read, who was born in Dublin, sixth in descent from Sir Thomas Read of Berkshire, England. His son, George Read (1733–98), was one of the signers of the Declaration of Independence, and as a lawyer helped frame the Constitution.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John Reade was born in 1340, in Checkendon, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Reade, was 40 and his mother, Margery Reide, was 21. He married Alice DeRougham in 1364, in Rougham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 20 May 1404, in his hometown, at the age of 64, and was buried in Berkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Reade est né en 1340, à Checkendon, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Reade, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Margery Reide, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Alice DeRougham en 1364, à Rougham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 20 mai 1404, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Berkshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Reade 1340 in Checkendon, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Reade 40 und seine Mutter Margery Reide 21. Er hat 1364 in Rougham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Alice DeRougham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 20. Mai 1404 im Alter von 64 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Berkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Reade è nato il nel 1340 nel Checkendon, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Reade, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Margery Reide, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Alice DeRougham nel 1364, nel Rougham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 20 maggio 1404, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Berkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Readeが1340年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアチェクエンドンで生まれた時，父Thomas Readeは40歳，母Margery Reideは21歳であった。1364年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクロウアムでAlice DeRoughamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1404年5月20日に故郷で64歳で死去し，イギリスバークシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Reade(이)가 1340년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 체c켄던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Reade(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Reide(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1364년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 루그함에서 Alice DeRougham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1404년 5월 20일 그의 고향에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 버크실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Reade nasceu em 1340, em Checkendon, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Reade, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Margery Reide, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice DeRougham em 1364, em Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 20 de maio de 1404, em sua cidade natal, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Berkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Reade родился в 1340 г. в местности чеккендон, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Reade было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Reide, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice DeRougham в 1364 г. в местности роугам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 20 мая 1404 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности биркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Reade nació en 1340, en Checkendon, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Reade, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Margery Reide, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Alice DeRougham en 1364, en Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 20 de mayo de 1404, en su pueblo, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Berkshire, Inglaterra.
